title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Lifestyle Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Lifestyle Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Lifestyle Advisory Limited invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Visual Merchandiser at our Srinagar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Lifestyle Advisory Limited:
Lifestyle Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Team Leadership

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lifestyle Advisory Limited!
